critical_aggregation_checks.current_manager_selection: PASS non-vacuous — code picks first managers[] entry with DepartureDate=='' ; test data orders 王平(departed) before 侯昊(active), so a naive take-first would fail the assertion
critical_aggregation_checks.min_drawdown: PASS non-vacuous — code takes min value with math.Inf sentinel + IsInf guard; test data -0.3368 then -0.3369 deliberately close, so take-first/take-max bugs would surface
critical_aggregation_checks.profile_fail_nil_vs_subfetch_empty: PASS — two distinct tests separate the two paths; profile fail returns nil (early return), sub-fetch fail leaves field empty (best-effort)

minor_observations: fetchNetValues 87.5% and FetchFundHistory 83.3%: uncovered lines are the json.Unmarshal-error and time.Parse-continue branches (defensive paths), not done_criteria-relevant. Above 80% threshold, acceptable.

Drawdown test data are static-min; no test for empty-drawdown→MaxDrawdown stays 0 (IsInf guard). Not in done_criteria; fetchFundInfo at 100% line coverage already exercises the populated branch. Optional hardening, not blocking.
